jobs.title: AI Engineer
jobs.description: Acme AI is hiring an AI Engineer to build production LLM applications. You will design RAG pipelines, evaluate model quality, and ship Python FastAPI services on AWS. Requirements: Bachelor's or Master's in Computer Science, 0-3 years experience, Python, APIs, familiarity with LLMs and retrieval augmented generation. Preferred: LangChain, Docker, PostgreSQL. We welcome candidates on STEM OPT; sponsorship may be available for strong fits.
required_qualifications: Bachelor's or Master's in Computer Science
responsibilities: Build and maintain production RAG systems
Develop FastAPI services for AI features
jobs.sponsorship_language: sponsorship may be available for strong fits

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.description: Build ML models for defense customers. Must be a U.S. citizen. Active security clearance required. 5+ years experience.
jobs.citizenship_or_clearance_language: Must be a U.S. citizen. Active security clearance required.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer, AI Platform
jobs.description: Cloudify seeks a Backend Engineer to build APIs and data pipelines powering generative AI features. Stack: Python, FastAPI, GCP, Postgres, vector search. 1-4 years experience. Master's degree a plus. Work authorization required; sponsorship not mentioned.
responsibilities: Design backend services for AI products
Build data pipelines for embeddings and evaluation

jobs.title: Staff Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.description: Staff ML Engineer to lead platform strategy. 10+ years required.
